textByHash.20d58640641a99133ae4b83eaa5ca048b8cd18b7: Hello again! Reckon you're ready for me to join you yet?
textByHash.35fec32e00108c482522b308f6336cb10b19c5b0: Really? Well, perhaps I'd be better off sticking with you then.
textByHash.63674200df94dad9868ab09886be2166ed15e398: I'm looking for an adventure! This place is meant to be the perfect place to find one for a budding pirate like me!
textByHash.750924f8298613bb61a3085175a2e480e8b8db0d: Really? Well, I hope that happens to me soon!
textByHash.a9777158d58b508ea9bc8a4c0368985b4b9eada3: Hang on... You don't actually look like much of an adventurer to me. I don't think this will work.
textByHash.b7764449b91e433b8887b7dfc05e43f8a14ddfbe: Great! I reckon this will be a fun adventure! I'll see you on your boat...
textByHash.e5f0f54743f30e8678aa719b1201c8036f5aaf5d: I'm looking forward to the next adventure! I might start writing down what we get up to.
